nav.logoffConfirm: Ka fita daga ko'ina? Wannan zai fitar da kai daga meet.witysk.org da one.witysk.org.

createMeeting.checkingSession: Ana duba zaman ku na one.witysk.org…
createMeeting.needSignIn: Kana buƙatar shiga one.witysk.org kafin ka iya ƙirƙirar taro.
createMeeting.haveJoinLink: Idan kana da hanyar shiga, bude ta kai tsaye — ba buƙatar asusu don shiga.
createMeeting.title: Ƙirƙiri taro
createMeeting.usingDefaults: Amfani da tsoffin saitunanku: har zuwa {{max}} mahalarta, {{recording}}.
createMeeting.fieldTitlePlaceholder: Taron mako-mako, 1:1 tare da Alice, da sauransu.
createMeeting.fieldBrandingHint: Ana nunawa a falon da kuma babban sandar taro. JPEG, PNG, WebP ko GIF; har zuwa 2 MB.
createMeeting.visibilityHint: Ta hanyar tsohuwa, kai kaɗai ne kake ganin wannan taron a shafin Gida naka.
createMeeting.listForAuth: Jera sunayen masu amfani da suka shiga a shafin Gida
createMeeting.listForAuthDesc: Duk wanda ya shiga ta one.witysk.org zai iya nema da shiga.
createMeeting.listForAnon: Hakanan jera ga baƙi (waɗanda ba su shiga ba)
createMeeting.listForAnonDesc: Taron yana bayyana a shafin saukarwa na jama'a.
createMeeting.unsupportedImageType: Nau'in hoton da ba a tallafawa {{type}}; yi amfani da JPEG, PNG, WebP, ko GIF.
createMeeting.imageTooLarge: Hoton yana da {{mb}} MB; mafi girma shine 2 MB.
createMeeting.uploadFailed: An ƙirƙiri taron amma ɗora alamar ya gaza: {{message}}

myMeetings.empty: Babu taro har yanzu — ƙirƙiri ɗaya a ƙasa.
myMeetings.deleteClosedConfirm: Share "{{title}}" har abada? Wannan yana cire taron daga jerin. Rikodi ba su shafa ba.
myMeetings.endMeetingConfirm: Ƙare "{{title}}" ga kowa? Wannan zai kori duk mahalarta.
myMeetings.inviteTitle: Ka gayyaci mutane ta hanyar imel
myMeetings.visibilityListed: Jera ga masu amfani da suka shiga
myMeetings.restartTitle: Sake buɗe wannan taro (yana kiyaye hanyar haɗi ɗaya)

room.endMeetingTitle: Ƙaddamar da taro da kuma kori kowa
room.endMeetingConfirm: Ka ƙare taron ga kowa? Wannan zai cire haɗin duk mahalarta.
room.inviteTitle: Ka gayyaci mutane ta hanyar imel

background.label: Tasirin bango
background.needCamera: Kunna kyamarar don amfani da bangon baya
background.needCameraFirst: Ka kunna kyamarar ka da farko.
background.tooLarge: Hoton yana da {{mb}} MB; mafi girma shine 4 MB.
background.processorFailed: Ba a goyan bayan tasirin baya akan wannan na'urar ba.

chatPanel.title: Hira
chatPanel.empty: Babu saƙonni har yanzu — yi sallama.

invite.title: Gayyato ta hanyar imel
invite.emailsHint: Raba da waƙafi, sarari, ko sabbin layuka. Mafi girma 20.
invite.messageHint: An nuna a cikin akwatin da aka ambata a ƙarƙashin rubutun gayyata.
invite.validNeeded: Shigar da aƙalla adireshin imel ɗaya mai inganci.
invite.tooMany: Mafi yawan masu karɓa 20 a kowane aika.

recordings.title: Rikodi
recordings.subtitle: Rikodin taron ku daga uwar garken. Fayilolin gida suna gogewa kai tsaye bayan kwanaki 30 (ko lokacin da kuka buga zuwa YouTube). Ana yin lodin ne kawai ta mai shi.
recordings.empty: Babu rikodin har yanzu. Fara taro kuma danna <1>Rikodi</1> don ɗaukar ɗaya.
recordings.publishConfirm:
Shigar da wannan rikodin zuwa YouTube a matsayin {{privacy}}?
Idan an yi nasara, za a goge fayil ɗin na gida; kawai hanyar haɗin YouTube za ta rage.
recordings.deleteConfirm: Share wannan rikodin? Fayil ɗin gida (idan akwai) an cire shi amma an ajiye hanyar YouTube.
recordings.expiresInDays_one: (fayil ɗin zai ƙare nan da {{count}} kwana)
recordings.expiresInDays_other: (fayil ɗin zai ƙare nan da kwanaki {{count}})
recordings.lastUploadFailed: Wannan ɗorawa ta ƙarshe ta gaza: {{message}}
recordings.publishTitle: Loda zuwa YouTube kuma share fayil ɗin gida idan an yi nasara.
recordings.signInBody: Rikodi na mai shi ne kawai. Shiga a one.witysk.org sannan ka sake loda wannan shafin.

settings.title: Saituna
settings.subtitle: Annabin zaɓin yana ajiye a wannan browser kawai. Suna aiki lokacin da ka shiga ko ƙirƙiri taro.

av.subtitle: Yadda makirufo da kyamarar ku ke aiki lokacin da kuka shiga taro.
av.cameraDefault: Lokacin da na shiga, kyamara ta kasance a kunne
av.micDefault: Lokacin da na shiga, makirufo na a kunne
av.defaultVolumeHint: An yi amfani da shi ga mai kunna sautin taro lokacin da kuka shiga.
av.ptt: Danna-danna don magana (riƙe maɓallin don aikawa)
av.pttHint: Idan an kunna, makirar ka za ta kasance a kashe sai dai idan ka riƙe maɓallin da ke ƙasa.

display.layoutAuto: Mai gabatarwa idan an saita, grid in ba haka ba
display.showNames: Nuna sunayen mahalarta a kan tiles
display.hideEmpty: Rufe fale-falen da ba su da kyamara ko sauti
display.maxTiles: Matsakaicin fale-falen da ake iya gani a lokaci guda

meeting.subtitle: Ana amfani da shi lokacin da kuka ƙirƙiri sabon taro — kuna iya canza shi kowane taro.
meeting.recordingAuto: Mai sarrafa kai — yi rikodin da zarar na shiga
meeting.recordingOff: Kashe — kar a ƙyale yin rikodi
meeting.autoEnd: Ƙare ta atomatik bayan (mintuna, 0 = ba za ta ƙare ba)
meeting.greetingHint: Ana nuna wa baƙi a shafin shiga.
meeting.welcomeHint: An buga waɗannan a cikin hira idan wani ya shiga.

moderation.subtitle: An sabunta tsarin taron sabo da na mai shi kawai.
moderation.autoAdmit: Tabbatar da masu amfani da aka tabbatar ta atomatik
moderation.requireName: Buki sunan nuni a lokacin shiga
moderation.autoMute: Mute kai tsaye ga sababbin masu shiga
moderation.autoCamOff: Kashe kyamara ta atomatik ga sabbin masu shiga
moderation.lockOnStart: Kulle ɗakin bayan taron ya fara
moderation.allowSs: Bada dama ga mahalarta su raba allo
moderation.allowChat: Bada dama ga mahalarta su yi hira

recording.subtitle: Saitunan mai shi kawai don rikodin gefen uwar garken.
recording.includeChat: Haɗa rubutun tattaunawa tare da rikodin
recording.ssSeparate: Rikodin raba allo azaman fayil daban
recording.captions: Saka rubutun kai tsaye a cikin rikodin
recording.noticeOnStart: Nuna sanarwa ga mahalarta lokacin da rikodi ya fara

notifications.browserNotif: Nuna sanarwar burauza idan wani ya shiga
notifications.ignoreOwnJoins: Kar a kunna sauti don shigowata
notifications.highlightModActions: Nuna ayyukan mai gudanarwa a cikin tarihin ayyuka
notifications.dndEnd: Karɓa ba a damu ba yana ƙarewa (HH:mm)

privacy.secureMode: Fara sabon taro a yanayin tsaro (E2EE — yana hana yin rikodi)
privacy.retention: Share bayanan rikodi na bayan (kwanaki, 0 = tsoho na uwar garken na 30)
privacy.anonymise: Boye bayanan imel na mahalarta a cikin rajistar shiga ta uwar garken
privacy.noLogIp: Kar a yi rikodin adireshin IP na tare da abubuwan shiga
privacy.noReadReceipts: Kashe karanta saƙonni a cikin taɗi
privacy.blurEmail: Rufe imel ɗin mahalarta a hotunan allo na

accessibility.captions: Bayanan kai tsaye (an samar da su ta atomatik)
accessibility.announceEvents: Sanar da abubuwan da suka shafi mahalarta ta hanyar mai karanta allo
accessibility.focusOutlines: Koyaushe nuna zanen mai da hankali kan madannai
accessibility.monoAudio: Haɗa sauti ɗaya (masu amfani da kunne ɗaya)

keyboard.wheelZoom: Gujin ƙafafun naɗawa yana ƙara girma tiles na mahalarta

network.quality: Ingancin bidiyo da aka fi so
network.forceRelay: Koyaushe yi amfani da TURN (tilasta hanyar watsa labarai)
network.prewarm: Fara dumama ICE a lokacin da aka buɗe shafin

chat.saveHistory: Ajiye tarihin hira a wannan na'urar
chat.sendOnEnter: Shigar da aika (kashe don Ctrl/Cmd+Shigar don aikawa)
chat.autoTranslate: Fassara ta atomatik zuwa yaren mu'amala na

appearance.bgOpacityHint: Ya shafi bayan taro da kuma rufin harabar.

developer.experimentalHint: Yi amfani da wannan browser don fasaloli waɗanda ƙila ba su cika ba ko kuma su canja ba tare da sanarwa ba.

reset.hint: Yana mayar da duk wani saiti a wannan shafin zuwa yadda yake a asali.

discover.title: Gano
discover.subtitle: — tarurruka da aka bude don shiga

inMeetingSettings.camOnJoin: Kunna kyamara lokacin da na shiga
inMeetingSettings.micOnJoin: Mai lasifika yana kunne idan na shiga
inMeetingSettings.soundOnJoin: Sauti lokacin da wani ya shiga
inMeetingSettings.quality: Ingancin bidiyo da aka fi so
inMeetingSettings.moreSettings: Ƙarin saituna suna nan a cikakken shafin <1>Settings</1>.

tile.stopFlip: Dakatar da jujjuya bidiyo a kwance

tiCafe.title: TI Café
tiCafe.subtitle: Membobin TI One Voice da ke kan layi a yanzu.
tiCafe.empty: Babu wani a kan layi a yanzu.
tiCafe.signInRequired: Shiga one.witysk.org tukuna don ganin wanda ke kan layi.
tiCafe.openToTalk: Bude don hira — ka iya aiko da saƙon sirri
tiCafe.birthday: Yau ranar haihuwar wannan mai amfani ce
tiCafe.vouches_one: An tabbatar da {{count}} lokaci ta wasu masu amfani
tiCafe.vouches_other: An tabbatar da {{count}} sau daga wasu masu amfani
tiCafe.viaOneWitysk: Bayanan kai tsaye daga one.witysk.org. Hanyoyin bayanan martaba da saƙonni suna buɗe a can a cikin sabon shafi.
tiCafe.signInTitle: Shiga don ganin wanda ke Café
tiCafe.signInBody: TI Café shine ra'ayin kai tsaye na wanda ke kan layi a cikin TI One Voice. Shiga a one.witysk.org kuma sake loda wannan shafin.
tiCafe.loadFailed: Ba a iya shiga one.witysk.org ba. Ka sake gwadawa nan da nan.
